title: China: The Growth Is Under Pressure but Indicators Remain Mixed
section_path: China: The Growth Is Under Pressure but Indicators Remain Mixed
section_path_text: China: The Growth Is Under Pressure but Indicators Remain Mixed
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The Chinese economy is, after a long period of exceptional growth, showing signs of a slowdown. The release of the inflation data earlier in the week yet again showed the disconnect between the export-driven industry and the domestic economy. The year-on-year price increases that the Chinese producers are facing are the steepest in thirteen years, at 9.5 per cent, and was above what the economists were anticipating.
